head: cde2151 2026-07-12 01:20:03 +0200
branches_note: ENG-2069 hazard: origin/dev is 12 commits AHEAD of origin/main (head 8aed191) and carries night-fix work that has NOT merged to main — incl. #40 billing entitlement-check/AI budget-preflight ratification (E2-S7), #38 FR-C5 REST-gap ledger completed to 73/73 dispositions (E5-S2), #37 cell-discovery seam pin, and ai.yaml AI-DTO stub commits (E2-S6). origin/crew/daniel is 0 ahead. All statuses below are as-of origin/main @ cde2151; where dev clearly advances a story it is called out in the note.

evidence: README.md (Layout table + 'Status: authored skeleton' honesty marker)
E1-S1.note: Full A-LAYOUT tree exists on disk and the README layout table + a status marker are present, but there is NO TestLayoutMatchesReadme bidirectional dir/table set-equality test and no orphan-dir negative case; validate_contracts.py scans dirs but never diffs them against the README table.

evidence: scripts/validate_contracts.py:120-158 (syntax + OpenAPI top-level keys + $ref resolution + catalog dataschema existence)
E1-S2.note: The self-validation CI runner is real and wired, but it does NOT enforce the T4 version-required rule or the T6 $id/servers-hygiene rule, and there is no TestValidateCatchesMalformedContract negative test that feeds a deliberately-broken artifact set (dangling $ref / missing version / literal servers) and asserts non-zero exit naming each violation.

evidence: SEAMS.md:4-32 (pinned vs referenced-but-unpinned states + build-blocking note)
E1-S3.note: SEAMS.md is authored with the pinned/referenced-but-unpinned state model and the six M0-pinned rows, and test_seams_all_pinned asserts those are pinned — but there is no TestUnpinnedSeamBlocksCutover completeness gate that makes a referenced-but-unpinned row exit non-zero for a satellite's cutover.

E1-S4.note: VERSION, CHANGELOG.md, per-artifact x-status markers and the v0.1.1 tag exist and are gated by test_seam_freeze, but there is no TestCodegenReproducibleFromTag proving byte-identical codegen from a tag with no network, and cell-lint pinning to an immutable tag (vs @dev) is not asserted.

E1-S5.note: The PR-template attestation half exists and is thorough, but the mechanical generator-signature lint is ABSENT — no script rejects files bearing a swagger-autogen banner or recorded-payload marker, and there is no TestGeneratorSignatureRejected. The agpl-import guard checks imports, not generator provenance.

evidence: openapi/_components/common.yaml (Error/Page/QuotaExceeded schemas + bearer + workloadIdentity scheme with x-rejects-bearer:true)
tests/test_envelope_contract.py:50 TestHttpEnvelopeContract (frozen, refs resolve, quota superset, pinned status)
E1-S6.note: Shared _components authored with the single error envelope, pagination/Page shape and both auth schemes; TestHttpEnvelopeContract meaningfully gates them. The specific 'every openapi file $refs the shared auth scheme and inlines none' cross-file assertion (TestComponentsSingleSourceOfAuth) is not isolated, but the substance + tests are present.

evidence: openapi/engine-primitives.yaml (15 paths: blocks, permissions/evaluate+accessible-space-ids+filter-accessible-page-ids, resolve-slug, page+space export, validate-api-key, exchange/consume, admin provision/deprovision, realtime-invalidate, export-policy/evaluate, quota/status)
tests/test_engine_primitives_contract.py:117 TestEnginePrimitivesQuotaContract (quota 402 pointer, cas ifVersion 409, session-exchange typed, auth-tier split, propagation, pinned ops)
E2-S1.note: engine-primitives.yaml is fully fleshed from titles-only to full operations and TestEnginePrimitivesQuotaContract asserts the 402 QUOTA_EXCEEDED superset and 409 VERSION_MISMATCH shapes. The served-OpenAPI-diff drift-gate conformance run (E6-S3) against a live engine is a separate, still-draft gate.

evidence: openapi/knowledge-query.yaml (10 paths: query/retrieve/related/duplicates, attachments/search, bundles + bundles/{id}, events, events/head, llms.txt)
E2-S2.note: Both surfaces are authored with the full operation set, but there is NO TestKnowledgeQueryConforms and no test covering the post-ACL-only count semantics or the projection-delta epoch-cursor+tombstone shape; conformance rests on the still-draft drift gate.

evidence: openapi/identity.yaml (9 paths: introspect, tokens CRUD, exchange, internal provision/deprovision, issuers, jwks, jwks/invalidate)
E2-S3.note: identity.yaml is authored incl. the issuer-registry/JWKS-mirror surface, but there is no TestIdentitySurfaceConforms drift/served-OpenAPI test; test_identity_schema_contract.py covers the identity/ JSON schemas (E4-S1), not this OpenAPI surface.

evidence: tests/test_knowledge_internal_rebuild_contract.py:126 TestRebuildStepContractGoldenRoundTrip (rebuild ops pinned+typed, additive-open schemas, golden round-trip)
E2-S4.note: The internal tier is authored on the workload-identity (mTLS/SPIFFE, bearer-rejecting) scheme and the rebuild step-APIs have a meaningful golden round-trip contract test. The explicit every-op-rejects-bearer assertion and the keyword-upsert version==FR-C8-version-space assertion are not isolated tests, but the behaviour + a real test are present.

evidence: tests/test_wiki_api_verb_grammar_contract.py:51 TestWikiApiVerbGrammarCoverage (typed move fields, revisions kind, export verb+bounded receipt, ADR-0008 disposition)
E2-S5.note: wiki-api.yaml realizes the search/get/save/edit/list verb grammar with a write-receipt schema and a meaningful verb-grammar coverage test; no 'ask' verb is present. The isolated 'version populated + ifVersion typed as monotonic-not-timestamp' TestWikiApiReceiptAndCas assertion is not named as such, but the surface + receipt schema + test are present.

E2-S6.note: ai.yaml + the K5 cited-answer schema are authored and the AI DTO stubs are gated as draft, but there is no TestAiK5SingleHome proving k5-cited-answer is referenced only by ai.yaml as owner and that spend-cap READS (not owns) the billing cap value. Note: origin/dev carries further ai.yaml AI-DTO stub + fixture commits not on main.

evidence: billing/plan.schema.json (LOCKED Free 200 pages / 2000 files + Personal 20000 pages / 53687091200 bytes / 20000 files; Teams/Enterprise slots present, values deferred; planVersion)
E2-S7.note: The plan/entitlements schemas encode the locked quota values, the Teams/Enterprise deferred rows and plan-version grandfathering, and billing.yaml is authored — but there is NO TestEntitlementSchemaLockedValues test asserting these. origin/dev #40 (8aed191) ratifies the canonical entitlement-check / AI budget-preflight to the shipped shape and is NOT on main.

evidence: events/catalog.yaml (wiki.attachment.created/.deleted, wiki.page.content_updated distinct from .updated, billing.entitlement.changed, no linear.*; each type carries profile/orderingkey/publisher/dataschema)
scripts/validate_events_contract.py:306 TestWikiEventCatalogContract (TestEventTaxonomyComplete, TestHeadSetLinearFree, TestCatalogEventsMdParity, control-frame checks)
E3-S1.note: catalog.yaml is authored to full EVENTS.md-aligned semantics with the stale-stub corrections, and TestWikiEventCatalogContract is a real, wired binary gate asserting the taxonomy, HEAD-set equality and the linear.* prohibition.

E3-S2.note: PROFILES.md is authored with the profile split, the frame-mapping model and the rich-frame re-resolution posture, but there is no TestProfileAndFrameMapConsistent that asserts every catalog type has a PROFILES.md entry and that the frame table covers every wiki.* type; validate_events_contract only checks catalog<->EVENTS.md parity, not PROFILES.md coverage.

evidence: events/catalog.yaml:50-67 obligations header (orderingkey per-page/space/tenant, publish-only-registered-types, D-CON-4 batch fan-out to per-page)
E3-S3.note: The publisher-obligations section is authored in the catalog header (version-carry, per-page fan-out, ordering keys, tenant extension), but there is no TestVersionProvenanceAndFanout asserting version==persisted-write-commit-counter and that no batch pageIds[] event type is emitted on the spine.

E3-S4.note: Per-type JSON schemas exist and version is largely in the required set, but wiki.page.content_updated.json still has additionalProperties:true (not false as T4 requires for a pinned content schema) and there is no TestContentEventRequiresVersion asserting that every content-bearing schema requires version + sets additionalProperties:false and that a stub omitting version fails.

E3-S5.note: The wire contract, the EVENTS.md frame catalog and the authority-flip placeholder are authored, but the DoD TestSseWireConformance replay harness (co-owned with E6-S3, driving resume / stream.gap / key-type-cap-token-scope filter against a serving stub) does not exist — the sse-conformance gate is x-status:draft with no reference tooling.

evidence: sse/RISKS.md (R1 space-level frame filter, R2 single-partition throughput ceiling, R3 rich-frame integrity D-CON-6, each cross-referenced)
E3-S6.note: RISKS.md authored and covers all three named risks with cross-references, but there is no TestRisksRegisterCoversNamedGaps test asserting their presence + cross-refs.

evidence: tests/test_authtest_corpus_contract.py:93 TestAuthConformanceTokenCorpusContract (synthetic-provenance, wrong-aud fails, structural conformance)
E4-S1.note: The shared identity schemas + synthetic conformance vectors are authored and two meaningful test classes gate them, incl. the wrong-aud-fails and synthetic-not-recorded assertions of TestTokenClaimsVectorsConform.

E4-S2.note: The registry-entry schema (with acl_primitive required = fail-closed) and the wiki.yaml first entry are authored, but there is no TestSourceRegistryFailClosed asserting that a missing/unreachable acl_primitive is rejected and a permissive/no-op ACL primitive is flagged.

E4-S3.note: Only a single trivial paragraph markdown/text_repr pair exists; the required golden coverage of the 21-embed catalog (tables, drawio/excalidraw/mermaid embeds, mentions, callouts, task lists) is absent, and there is no TestGoldenFixturesAuthoredNotSnapshot provenance/coverage gate. This is a scaffold placeholder, not the corpus.

evidence: fixtures/dfm/ (embeds 21 types, nodes, marks, mentions, opaque) + manifest.json
packages/dfm/src/__tests__/golden-corpus.spec.ts (TestCoverageGate: every registered type/mark has a fixture pair) + dfm.spec.ts (26 round-trip cases) + ai-authored-roundtrip.spec.ts
E4-S4.note: The DfM<->ProseMirror round-trip corpus is authored across the 21-embed catalog incl. opaque nodes + both mention formats, with a vendored TS reference serializer whose jest suite proves byte-identical round-trip and a coverage gate keyed on the live registry.

evidence: tests/test_errorcode_contract.py:53 TestErrorCodeExitBucketContract (buckets complete, codes->buckets, quota/budget 402 bucket, no LINEAR_ codes, order frozen, namespaced-extension no-renumber)
E5-S1.note: The frozen errorCode vocabulary + 0-9 exit-code mapping are authored and TestErrorCodeExitBucketContract directly realizes TestErrorVocabularyFrozenAndMapped incl. the 402 superset, no-LINEAR and namespaced-no-renumber assertions.

evidence: mcp/rest-gap-ledger.yaml (DRAFT SKELETON — ~12 representative rows, self-declares 'completed to all ~73 tools in v0.3')
E5-S2.note: The ledger structure + disposition vocabulary (covered/new-primitive/retired) are authored with a handful of rows, but it is NOT complete to the ~73 tools and there is no TestRestGapEveryToolDispositioned. origin/dev #38 (5ae767e) completes FR-C5 to 73/73 dispositions and is NOT on main.

evidence: tests/test_agpl_guard_contract.py:38 TestAgplImportGuardContract (clean exit0, violation exit1 go+ts, denylist pinned no-allowlist, license+engine exempt, no-network)
E6-S1.note: The AGPL-import guard config + guard script are authored and TestAgplImportGuardContract meaningfully realizes TestAgplGuardBlocksDenylistedImport incl. the engine-exempt and no-allowlist-mechanism assertions; the guard is also wired live in validate.yaml over this repo.

evidence: gates/allowlist.yaml (mode: report-only; only 2 PLACEHOLDER touch-points + TODO(OQ-C2))
E6-S2.note: allowlist/baseline/weighting scaffolds + report-mode wiring exist, but the allow-list content is explicitly PLACEHOLDER (2 of ~11, awaiting OQ-C2), there is no synthetic fork-diff fixture and no TestDivergenceGateReportOnlyThenEnforce proving report-only vs enforce behaviour.

E6-S3.note: The four drift gates are DECLARED in gates.yaml and a report-mode runner exists, but three of four gates are x-status:draft with NO reference tooling and there is no TestDriftGatesCatchDivergence exercising synthetic diverging fixtures for a/b/c/d; only dfm-parity has runnable reference tooling.

evidence: gates/drift/gates.yaml (apikey-behavioural-parity + crash-injection-replay-completeness declared as x-status:draft lines with no reference_tooling)
E6-S4.note: Only two placeholder gate DECLARATIONS exist; the FR-31 engine-side harness definitions are not authored as executable specs — no TestOutboxNoLossOnCrash, no crash-injection fixture, no api-key-parity replay spec.

evidence: gates/drift/dfm-parity-check.sh (fixture-shape + JSON-loadability + D-S11 linear-scrub reference tooling, no cross-serializer code path)
E6-S5.note: The DfM parity gate DEFINITION (A-DFM) is authored with runnable reference tooling that proves the corpus-side half fixture-mediated, explicitly with no code path reading the other serializer; the Go leg runs in lib CI and the TS leg is proven by the vendored packages/dfm jest suite.

evidence: obs/CONVENTIONS.md (service-naming table, shared attribute keys orvex.tenant/cell/source_id/contract_tag/error_code, emission conventions — 'Status: DRAFT SKELETON')
E7-S1.note: The observability conventions appendix is authored with the service-naming rule, the required shared attribute keys and the console label vocabulary, but there is no TestObsConventionsComplete and no telemetry-name fixture that a violation would flag.

E7-S2.note: Governance seeds exist — the PR-template versioning lane, CODEOWNERS and an ADR-0008 precedent in DESIGN-NOTES — but the FR-C17 semver/drift-gate change-lane CLASSIFIER tooling is not implemented and there is no TestChangeLaneClassifier routing additive PRs to the automated lane and breaking/ambiguous PRs to the ADR lane.

summary: orvex-studio-contracts is a genuinely mature contract set on origin/main @ cde2151: the OpenAPI seam surfaces, CloudEvents catalog, identity/error/DfM artifacts and the AGPL-import guard are authored and backed by real, wired Python/jest binary gates (10 of 32 stories fully present with meaningful tests). The dominant gap is executable cross-repo/negative gates: the drift, divergence, SSE-conformance, generator-signature, layout-equality and change-lane-classifier tests named in the DoDs are mostly still declarative skeletons (21 partial), the golden markdown corpus is a single placeholder pair, and only the FR-31 engine-side crash/api-key harness (E6-S4) is truly absent. ENG-2069 hazard is live: origin/dev is 12 commits ahead and advances at least E2-S7 (billing ratification #40), E5-S2 (REST-gap 73/73 #38) and E2-S6 (ai DTO stubs) beyond what main shows.
